message:
fix(fcp-webhook): deduplicate routed handlers, generate deterministic event IDs, fix Slack event type

EventRouter::route now deduplicates handlers so overlapping subscriptions
don't deliver the same event twice to the same handler.

When GitHub/Stripe webhooks lack a delivery/event ID header, generate a
deterministic SHA-256 hash of (provider, event_type, body) instead of a
random UUID. This ensures idempotency checks work correctly for
redelivered webhooks that arrive without IDs.

Fix Slack event type extraction to use the inner event.type field
("message") instead of the envelope type ("event_callback"), matching
how subscriptions are typically registered.

Add integration test verifying distinct event types with missing delivery
headers produce distinct deterministic IDs. Clean up trailing whitespace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
